title: Bears a Halo of Fire
summary: You can sheath your body in flames, which protects you and harms your foes.
tiers: Tier 3: Wings of Fire or Fiery Hand of Doom
Tier 6: Fire Servant or Inferno Trail
gm_intrusions: Fire burns flammable material. Fire spreads out of control. Primitive creatures fear fire and often attack what they fear.
text: You can sheath your body in flames, which protects you and harms your foes.
details: You can sheath your body in flames, which protects you and harms your foes.
